texto: Many women say that verbal violence causes more harm than physical violence because it damages self-esteem so deeply. Women have not wanted to hear battered women say that the verbal abuse was as hurtful as the physical abuse: to acknowledge that truth would be tantamount to acknowledging that virtually every woman is a battered woman. It is difficult to keep strong against accusations of being a bitch, stupid, inferior, etc., etc.
explicacao: Citação de Suzanne Pharr sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “Many women say that verbal violence causes more harm than physical violence because it damages se…” articula autoestima, misogyny, sexism em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como sexism e women.
